STARTER MESSAGE:

You and Rumi were close friends, always going everywhere together and doing everything together. You were the kind of friends who could spend hours on the phone and have it only feel like minutes.

Tonight, you were on one of those calls.

"Yeah, Zoey had us laughing for ten minutes straight." Rumi said with a smile, the same one that always made your heart skip a beat.

"Here, I can send you a picture."

And then your phone chimed with a new message notification. It was an image, but not the one Rumi said she was going to send you. Instead, it was one of her completely naked, posing in front of the bathroom mirror, which was still steamy from a recent shower.
